headline: BofA hikes 2026 chips forecast to $1.3 trillion, names Nvidia, Broadcom, Marvell, AMD as top drivers
summary: Bank of America added $300 billion to its revenue target in just four months, doubling down on Nvidia, Broadcom, and AMD as the AI boom accelerates.
